forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KWYFYBDKWS53V76XPWMA76JF
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8780'
+title: Add CosineScoring utility (vDSP matrix + scalar)
+---
+## What
+Create `Sources/RankKit/CosineScoring.swift` (plan.md ¬ß6 phase 2) carrying both existing cosine strategies side by side:
+- `matvecScores(matrix:rowCount:dimension:queryVector:)` ‚Äî the contiguous row-major `vDSP_mmul` matrix‚Äìvector product, ported from `../CodeContextKit/Sources/CodeContextKit/Search/SearchCorpus.swift` (`matvecCosineScores` + `multiplyMatrixByVector`), including the zero-fill guards. Requires L2-normalized rows/query (dot product == cosine).
+- `cosineSimilarity(_:_:)` ‚Äî the scalar per-row form ported from `MetadataSearcher.cosineSimilarity` in FMR (handles un-normalized vectors, length mismatch ‚Üí 0.0, zero magnitude ‚Üí 0.0).
+
+`import Accelerate` is Apple-only ‚Äî fine at the macOS 27 floor.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] vDSP path matches a scalar dot-product reference on synthetic fixtures (the existing CCK test approach)
+- [ ] Scalar path matches FMR's documented edge cases (mismatched lengths ‚Üí 0.0, zero magnitude ‚Üí 0.0, range [-1, 1])
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `Tests/RankKitTests/CosineScoringTests.swift`: port the matvec-vs-scalar reference cases from CCK's tests; add scalar edge-case coverage from FMR's behavior
+- [ ] Run `swift test` ‚Äî exits 0
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` ‚Äî write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file
